messages.content:
阅读以下两个README，告诉我怎么使用openhands上自动化评测swe-bench：# OpenHands Benchmarks
This repository contains benchmark evaluation infrastructure for [OpenHands](https://github.com/OpenHands/OpenHands/) agents. It provides standardized evaluation pipelines for testing agent capabilities across various real-world tasks.
⚠️ **Migration in Progress**: We are currently migrating the [benchmarks from OpenHands V0](https://github.com/OpenHands/OpenHands/tree/main/evaluation) to work with the [OpenHands Software Agent SDK](https://github.com/OpenHands/software-agent-sdk) infrastructure in V1.
## Available Benchmarks
| Benchmark | Description | Status |
|-----------|-------------|--------|
| [SWE-Bench](benchmarks/swebench/) | Software engineering tasks from GitHub issues | ✅ Active |
| [GAIA](benchmarks/gaia/) | General AI assistant tasks requiring multi-step reasoning | ✅ Active |
| [Commit0](benchmarks/commit0/) | Python function implementation tasks with unit tests | ✅ Active |
| [OpenAgentSafety](benchmarks/openagentsafety/) | AI agent safety evaluation in workplace scenarios with NPC interactions | ✅ Active |
See the individual benchmark directories for detailed usage instructions.
## Quick Start
### Prerequisites
Before running any benchmarks, you need to set up the environment and ensure the local Agent SDK submodule is initialized.
```bash
make build
```
<details>
<summary>📦 Submodule & Environment Setup (click to expand)</summary>
### 🧩 1. Initialize the Agent SDK submodule
The Benchmarks project uses a **local git submodule** for the [OpenHands Agent SDK](https://github.com/OpenHands/software-agent-sdk).
This ensures your code runs against a specific, reproducible commit.
Run once after cloning (already done in `make build` for you):
```bash
git submodule update --init --recursive
```
This command will:
- clone the SDK into `vendor/software-agent-sdk/`
- check out the exact commit pinned by this repo
- make it available for local development `uv sync` will install from the local folder)
If you ever clone this repository again, remember to re-initialize the submodule with the same command.
---
### 🏗️ 2. Build the environment
Once the submodule is set up, install dependencies via [uv](https://docs.astral.sh/uv):
```bash
make build
```
This runs:
```bash
uv sync
```
and ensures the `openhands-*` packages (SDK, tools, workspace, agent-server) are installed **from the local workspace** declared in `pyproject.toml`.
---
### 🔄 3. Update the submodule (when SDK changes)
If you want to update to a newer version of the SDK:
```bash
cd vendor/software-agent-sdk
git fetch
git checkout <new_commit_or_branch>
cd ../..
git add vendor/software-agent-sdk
git commit -m "Update software-agent-sdk submodule to <new_commit_sha>"
```
Then re-run:
```bash
make build
```
to rebuild your environment with the new SDK code.
</details>
### Configure Your LLM
All benchmarks require an LLM configuration file. Define your LLM config as a JSON following the model fields in the [LLM class](https://github.com/OpenHands/software-agent-sdk/blob/main/openhands/sdk/llm/llm.py#L93).
**Example** `.llm_config/example.json`):
```json
{
  "model": "litellm_proxy/anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-20250514",
  "base_url": "https://llm-proxy.eval.all-hands.dev",
  "api_key": "YOUR_API_KEY_HERE"
}
```
Validate your configuration:
```bash
uv run validate-cfg .llm_config/YOUR_CONFIG_PATH.json
```
## Running Benchmarks
After setting up the environment and configuring your LLM, see the individual benchmark directories for specific usage instructions:
- **[SWE-Bench](benchmarks/swebench/)**: Software engineering tasks from GitHub issues
- **[GAIA](benchmarks/gaia/)**: General AI assistant tasks requiring multi-step reasoning  
- **[OpenAgentSafety](benchmarks/openagentsafety/)**: AI agent safety evaluation in workplace scenarios with NPC interactions
## Triggering Cloud Evals from This Repo
This repo exposes a manual GitHub Actions workflow that dispatches the `run-eval.yml` workflow in the Software Agent SDK. It is useful when you want to launch evals from the benchmarks repo without switching to the SDK repo.
Requirements:
- The `ALLHANDS_BOT_GITHUB_PAT` secret must be available in this repository with permission to dispatch workflows in `OpenHands/software-agent-sdk`.
Run it with `gh`:
```bash
gh workflow run run-eval.yml --repo OpenHands/benchmarks --ref main \
  -f benchmark=swebench \
  -f sdk_ref=main \
  -f eval_limit=50 \
  -f model_ids=litellm_proxy/anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-20250514 \
  -f reason="benchmarks-trigger" \
  -f eval_branch=main \
  -f benchmarks_branch=main \
  -f instance_ids="" \
  -f num_infer_workers="" \
  -f num_eval_workers=""
```
Inputs (forwarded to the SDK `run-eval.yml` workflow):
- `benchmark`: Benchmark suite to run. Choices: `gaia`, `swebench`, `swtbench`, `commit0`. Default: `swebench`.
- `sdk_ref`: SDK commit, tag, or branch to evaluate. Default: `main`.
- `eval_limit`: Number of instances to run. Choices: `1`, `50`, `200`, `500`. Default: `1`.
- `model_ids`: Comma-separated model IDs (keys of `MODELS` in the SDK `.github/run-eval/resolve_model_config.py`). Empty uses the SDK default.
- `reason`: Free-form reason for the manual trigger (shows up in logs/PR comments). Optional.
- `eval_branch`: Branch of the evaluation repo to use (e.g., feature testing). Default: `main`.
- `benchmarks_branch`: Benchmarks repo branch to evaluate (use your feature branch to test changes). Default: `main`.
- `instance_ids`: Comma-separated instance IDs to run (overrides `eval_limit` for supported benchmarks). Optional.
- `num_infer_workers`: Override inference worker count (blank uses benchmark default). Optional.
- `num_eval_workers`: Override evaluation worker count (blank uses benchmark default). Optional.
## Workspace Types
Benchmarks support two workspace types for running evaluations:
### Docker Workspace (Default)
Uses local Docker containers to run agent evaluations. Images are built locally on-demand.
- **Pros**: No additional setup required, works offline
- **Cons**: Resource-intensive on local machine, slower for large-scale evaluations
- **Use case**: Development, testing, small-scale evaluations
### Remote Workspace
Uses a [remote runtime API](https://openhands.dev/blog/evaluation-of-llms-as-coding-agents-on-swe-bench-at-30x-speed) to provision containers in a cloud environment, enabling massive parallelization.
- **Pros**: Scalable to hundreds of parallel workers, no local resource constraints
- **Cons**: Requires pre-built images and API access
- **Use case**: Large-scale evaluations, benchmarking runs
#### How Remote Runtime Works
1. **Pre-build Agent Images**: Agent-server images must be pre-built for a specific SDK commit (SHA) and pushed to a public container registry (e.g., `ghcr.io/openhands/eval-agent-server`)
2. **Runtime API**: The remote workspace connects to a runtime API service (default: `https://runtime.eval.all-hands.dev`) that provisions containers on-demand
3. **Image Resolution**: Before starting evaluation, the system verifies that the required image exists in the registry with the correct tag format: `{IMAGE}:{SDK_SHA}-{CUSTOM_TAG}{SUFFIX}`
4. **Parallel Execution**: Each evaluation instance runs in its own isolated container, allowing for massive parallelization (e.g., 32+ concurrent workers)
#### Prerequisites for Remote Workspace
1. **Pre-built Images**: Images must be built and pushed to a public registry
   - In this repository, add one of the following labels to a PR to trigger image builds:
     - `build-swebench-50`: Build 50 images (quick testing)
     - `build-swebench-200`: Build 200 images (medium testing)
     - `build-swebench`: Build all images (full evaluation)
   - Images are tagged with the SDK SHA from the `vendor/software-agent-sdk` submodule
2. **Runtime API Key**: Set the `RUNTIME_API_KEY` environment variable
   ```bash
   export RUNTIME_API_KEY="your-api-key-here"
   ```
3. **Optional Configuration**:
   - `RUNTIME_API_URL`: Override the default API endpoint (default: `https://runtime.eval.all-hands.dev`)
   - `SDK_SHORT_SHA`: Override the SDK SHA for image selection (default: auto-detected from submodule)
See individual benchmark READMEs for specific usage examples.
## SDK Compatibility and Version Management
⚠️ **Important**: The benchmarks repository depends on the [OpenHands Agent SDK](https://github.com/OpenHands/software-agent-sdk), and **not every version of the benchmarks is compatible with every version of the SDK**. As the SDK evolves and introduces new features, the benchmarks code may adopt these features, creating version dependencies.
### SWE-Bench image layering (docutils/roman)
Some SWE-Bench instances (notably `sphinx-doc`) require `docutils<0.21` and `roman`. The build pipeline now wraps only those images that need the extra layer:
- `benchmarks/swebench/build_images.py` wraps images for repos in a small allowlist (currently `sphinx-doc`).
- Other repos (e.g., scikit-learn) keep the base image unchanged.
- Wrapped images reuse the same tag (no suffix) since they're evaluation-only.
When running or dispatching builds, no extra flags are needed—the selective wrapping is handled for you.
### Evaluating Different SDK Versions
When evaluating a specific SDK version, you need to ensure the benchmarks code is compatible with that SDK version. You have two options:
1. **Use the `benchmarks-commit` parameter in the workflow** (Recommended):
   - When manually triggering the `build-swebench-images` workflow (builds + wraps images in-place), specify both:
     - `sdk-commit`: The SDK version you want to evaluate
     - `benchmarks-commit`: A benchmarks commit that's compatible with that SDK version
2. **Manually check out compatible versions locally**:
   ```bash
   # Check out a benchmarks commit that's compatible with your target SDK version
   git checkout <benchmarks-commit>
   # Update the SDK submodule to your target version
   cd vendor/software-agent-sdk
   git checkout <sdk-commit>
   cd ../..
   # Rebuild the environment
   make build
   ```
### Example: SDK Critic Module
A notable example of version dependency is the SDK critic module. As of SDK commit `79868ae5`](https://github.com/OpenHands/software-agent-sdk/commit/79868ae5) (November 17, 2025), the OpenHands Agent SDK introduced the `openhands.sdk.critic` module. Current benchmarks code imports `CriticBase` from this module, which means:
- **SDK versions ≥ `79868ae5`**: Compatible with current benchmarks code
- **SDK versions < `79868ae5`**: Require an older benchmarks commit (before the critic import was added)
To check if a specific benchmarks commit requires the critic module:
```bash
git show <commit>:benchmarks/utils/models.py | grep "from openhands.sdk.critic"
```
If this command returns output, that benchmarks commit requires an SDK version with the critic module.
## Links
- **Original OpenHands**: https://github.com/OpenHands/OpenHands/
- **Agent SDK**: https://github.com/OpenHands/software-agent-sdk
- **SWE-Bench**: https://www.swebench.com/
  
* * *
# SWE-Bench Benchmark Evaluation
This directory contains the implementation for running SWE-Bench evaluation using OpenHands agents.
## Overview
SWE-Bench is a benchmark for evaluating AI agents on real-world software engineering tasks derived from GitHub issues. The benchmark tests an agent's ability to understand problem statements, navigate codebases, and generate patches that resolve issues.
## Dataset
- **Source**: Princeton NLP
- **Datasets**:
  - `princeton-nlp/SWE-bench` - Full dataset
  - `princeton-nlp/SWE-bench_Lite` - Smaller curated subset
  - `princeton-nlp/SWE-bench_Verified` - Verified instances
- **Splits**: `test`, `dev`
## Usage
### Docker Workspace (Local Evaluation)
#### Step 1: Build Docker Images
Before running inference, you need to build Docker images for the SWE-Bench instances. Each instance requires a specific environment setup based on the repository and issue.
```bash
uv run python -m benchmarks.swebench.build_images \
  --dataset princeton-nlp/SWE-bench_Verified \
  --split test \
  --image ghcr.io/openhands/eval-agent-server \
  --target source-minimal
```
#### Step 2: Run Inference
Run evaluation using the built Docker images:
```bash
uv run swebench-infer path/to/llm_config.json \
    --dataset princeton-nlp/SWE-bench_Verified \
    --split test \
    --max-iterations 100 \
    --workspace docker
```
**Selecting specific instances:**
You can run evaluation on a specific subset by creating a text file with instance IDs:
```bash
# Create instances.txt with one instance ID per line
echo "django__django-11333" > instances.txt
echo "astropy__astropy-12345" >> instances.txt
# Run with selection
uv run swebench-infer path/to/llm_config.json \
    --select instances.txt \
    --workspace docker
```
### Remote Workspace (Scalable Cloud Evaluation)
Remote workspace enables running evaluations at scale by using a cloud-based runtime API to provision containers. This is ideal for large-scale benchmark runs with high parallelization.
#### Step 1: Pre-build and Push Images
Images must be pre-built and pushed to a **public** container registry before running remote evaluations.
**Option A: Automated Build via PR Label (Recommended)**
1. Create or update a PR in this repository
2. Add one of the following labels to the PR to trigger image builds:
   - `build-swebench-50`: Build 50 images (quick testing, ~5-10 minutes)
   - `build-swebench-200`: Build 200 images (medium testing, ~20-40 minutes)
   - `build-swebench`: Build all images (full evaluation, ~1-2 hours)
3. The GitHub Action will automatically:
   - Build agent-server images for instances in `princeton-nlp/SWE-bench_Verified` (test split)
   - Push images to `ghcr.io/openhands/eval-agent-server` with tags like:
     ```
     ghcr.io/openhands/eval-agent-server:{SDK_SHA}-{INSTANCE_TAG}-source-minimal
     ```
   - The docutils/roman layer is applied in-place (no suffix) for allowlisted repos that need it (currently `sphinx-doc`)
   - Post a comment on [issue #81](https://github.com/OpenHands/benchmarks/issues/81) with the build results
**Option B: Manual Build**
```bash
uv run python -m benchmarks.swebench.build_images \
  --dataset princeton-nlp/SWE-bench_Verified \
  --split test \
  --image ghcr.io/openhands/eval-agent-server \
  --target source-minimal \
  --push \
  --max-workers 32
```
**Important Notes:**
- Images must be **publicly accessible** for the remote runtime to pull them
- The SDK SHA is automatically detected from the `vendor/software-agent-sdk` submodule
- Each SWE-Bench instance gets its own unique image tag based on the repository and issue
#### Step 2: Set Up Environment Variables
```bash
# Required: Your runtime API key
export RUNTIME_API_KEY="your-runtime-api-key-here"
# Optional: Override default runtime API URL
export RUNTIME_API_URL="https://runtime.eval.all-hands.dev"
# Optional: Override SDK SHA for image selection
# (defaults to auto-detected from vendor/software-agent-sdk submodule)
export SDK_SHORT_SHA="abc1234"
```
#### Step 3: Run Inference with Remote Workspace
Run evaluation using the remote workspace with high parallelization:
```bash
uv run swebench-infer .llm_config/sonnet-4-5.json \
    --dataset princeton-nlp/SWE-bench_Verified \
    --split test \
    --workspace remote \
    --num-workers 32 \
    --max-iterations 500 \
    --n-limit 200
```
**Command Options Explained:**
- `--workspace remote`: Use remote runtime instead of local Docker
- `--num-workers 32`: Run 32 instances in parallel (adjust based on your quota)
- `--max-iterations 500`: Maximum steps per instance (higher for complex tasks)
- `--n-limit 200`: Limit to first 200 instances (optional, for testing)
**Example: Full-scale Evaluation**
```bash
# Run on all instances with maximum parallelization
uv run swebench-infer .llm_config/sonnet-4-5.json \
    --workspace remote \
    --num-workers 64 \
    --max-iterations 500
```
**Example: Subset Evaluation**
```bash
# Test on a small subset first
echo "django__django-11333" > test_instances.txt
echo "django__django-12155" >> test_instances.txt
uv run swebench-infer .llm_config/sonnet-4-5.json \
    --select test_instances.txt \
    --workspace remote \
    --num-workers 2 \
    --max-iterations 300
```
#### Troubleshooting Remote Workspace
**Error: "RUNTIME_API_KEY environment variable is not set"**
- Solution: Export the `RUNTIME_API_KEY` environment variable before running
**Error: "Agent server image ... does not exist in container registry"**
- Solution: Ensure images are pre-built and pushed using Step 1
- Verify the SDK SHA matches between your local submodule and the built images
- Check that images are publicly accessible in the registry
**Error: "Connection timeout" or API errors**
- Solution: Check your network connectivity
- Verify the `RUNTIME_API_URL` is correct
- Ensure your API key has sufficient quota for the number of workers
### Comparing Docker vs Remote Workspace
| Aspect | Docker Workspace | Remote Workspace |
|--------|-----------------|------------------|
| **Setup** | Simple, no prerequisites | Requires pre-built images + API key |
| **Scale** | Limited by local resources | Hundreds of parallel workers |
| **Speed** | Slower for large evaluations | Much faster with parallelization |
| **Cost** | Local compute only | API usage costs |
| **Use Case** | Development, testing | Production benchmarks, research |
## Evaluation
After running inference (with either workspace type), evaluate the generated patches using the official SWE-Bench evaluation:
**Basic evaluation:**
```bash
uv run swebench-eval output.jsonl
```
**Advanced options:**
```bash
# Specify custom dataset and output file
uv run swebench-eval output.jsonl \
  --dataset princeton-nlp/SWE-bench_Lite \
  --output-file results.swebench.jsonl
# Only convert format without running evaluation
uv run swebench-eval output.jsonl --skip-evaluation
```
The evaluation script will:
1. Convert OpenHands output format to SWE-Bench prediction format
2. Run the official SWE-Bench evaluation harness (unless `--skip-evaluation` is used)
3. Report pass/fail results for each instance
## References
- [SWE-Bench Paper](https://arxiv.org/abs/2310.06770)
- [SWE-Bench GitHub](https://github.com/princeton-nlp/SWE-bench)
- [SWE-Bench Leaderboard](https://www.swebench.com/)

# 使用 OpenHands 自动化评测 SWE-Bench 超详细指南

根据这两个 README，以下是完整且详细的使用流程，包含原理说明、最佳实践和故障排查。

---

## 📋 目录
1. [系统概述](#系统概述)
2. [环境准备](#环境准备)
3. [本地 Docker 评测](#本地-docker-评测)
4. [远程云端评测](#远程云端评测)
5. [结果评估](#结果评估)
6. [高级配置](#高级配置)
7. [故障排查](#故障排查)
8. [性能优化建议](#性能优化建议)

---

## 系统概述

### 什么是 SWE-Bench？
SWE-Bench（Software Engineering Benchmark）是由普林斯顿大学 NLP 团队开发的基准测试套件，用于评估 AI 代理解决真实 GitHub 问题的能力。

**核心特点：**
- 基于真实的 GitHub issues 和 pull requests
- 涵盖多个流行开源项目（Django、Scikit-learn、Astropy 等）
- 测试代理的代码理解、导航和补丁生成能力

**可用数据集：**
| 数据集 | 描述 | 规模 |
|--------|------|------|
| `princeton-nlp/SWE-bench` | 完整数据集 | ~2,000+ 实例 |
| `princeton-nlp/SWE-bench_Lite` | 精选子集 | ~300 实例 |
| `princeton-nlp/SWE-bench_Verified` | 经过验证的实例 | ~500 实例 |

### OpenHands 架构

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│          Benchmarks Repository              │
│  (评测脚本、配置、工作流)                      │
└─────────────┬───────────────────────────────┘
              │ 依赖
              ▼
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│      OpenHands Agent SDK (Submodule)        │
│  (核心 SDK、LLM 接口、工具、工作空间管理)        │
└─────────────┬───────────────────────────────┘
              │ 使用
              ▼
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│       Workspace 执行环境                     │
│  - Docker: 本地容器                          │
│  - Remote: 云端 Runtime API                 │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

**重要概念：**
- **Submodule 管理**：SDK 作为 git submodule 嵌入，确保版本一致性
- **工作空间类型**：
  - **Docker**：本地容器，适合开发测试
  - **Remote**：云端 API，支持大规模并行

---

## 环境准备

### 1️⃣ 系统要求

**必需软件：**
```bash
# Python 3.11+
python --version

# uv（Python 包管理器）
curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh

# Docker（仅本地评测需要）
docker --version

# Git
git --version

# GitHub CLI（可选，用于触发云端评测）
gh --version
```

**硬件建议：**
| 组件 | 本地 Docker | 远程云端 |
|------|------------|---------|
| CPU | 8+ 核心 | 不限 |
| 内存 | 16GB+ | 不限 |
| 磁盘 | 100GB+ 可用空间 | 最小 |
| 网络 | 稳定连接 | 高带宽 |

### 2️⃣ 克隆仓库并初始化

```bash
# 克隆主仓库
git clone https://github.com/OpenHands/benchmarks.git
cd benchmarks

# 一键构建（自动处理 submodule 和依赖）
make build
```

**`make build` 详细执行过程：**
```bash
# 1. 初始化 submodule
git submodule update --init --recursive
# 这会克隆 vendor/software-agent-sdk/ 到指定 commit

# 2. 安装依赖
uv sync
# 从 pyproject.toml 安装所有依赖，包括本地 SDK
```

**手动步骤（如果 make build 失败）：**
```bash
# 步骤 1：初始化 submodule
git submodule update --init --recursive

# 步骤 2：查看 submodule 状态
git submodule status
# 输出示例：79868ae5... vendor/software-agent-sdk (heads/main)

# 步骤 3：安装依赖
uv sync

# 步骤 4：验证安装
uv run python -c "from openhands.sdk import LLM; print('SDK imported successfully')"
```

### 3️⃣ 配置 LLM

创建 LLM 配置文件，支持多种 LLM 提供商。

**目录结构建议：**
```
benchmarks/
├── .llm_config/
│   ├── claude-sonnet.json
│   ├── gpt4.json
│   ├── deepseek.json
│   └── local-model.json
```

**配置示例：**

**Claude Sonnet 4（推荐用于 SWE-Bench）：**
```json
{
  "model": "litellm_proxy/anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-20250514",
  "base_url": "https://llm-proxy.eval.all-hands.dev",
  "api_key": "YOUR_ANTHROPIC_API_KEY",
  "temperature": 0.0,
  "max_tokens": 4096
}
```

**OpenAI GPT-4：**
```json
{
  "model": "gpt-4-turbo-2024-04-09",
  "api_key": "sk-YOUR_OPENAI_API_KEY",
  "temperature": 0.0,
  "max_tokens": 4096
}
```

**DeepSeek Coder：**
```json
{
  "model": "deepseek-coder",
  "base_url": "https://api.deepseek.com",
  "api_key": "YOUR_DEEPSEEK_API_KEY",
  "temperature": 0.0
}
```

**本地模型（通过 Ollama）：**
```json
{
  "model": "ollama/codellama:34b",
  "base_url": "http://localhost:11434",
  "temperature": 0.0
}
```

**配置字段说明：**
- `model`：模型标识符（必需）
- `base_url`：API 端点（可选，使用代理或本地服务时需要）
- `api_key`：认证密钥（必需）
- `temperature`：采样温度（0.0 = 确定性输出）
- `max_tokens`：最大生成长度

**验证配置：**
```bash
# 基础验证
uv run validate-cfg .llm_config/claude-sonnet.json

# 测试 API 连通性
uv run python -c "
from openhands.sdk.llm import LLM
import json

with open('.llm_config/claude-sonnet.json') as f:
    config = json.load(f)

llm = LLM(**config)
response = llm.complete('Say hello')
print(f'✓ API working: {response}')
"
```

---

## 本地 Docker 评测

### 适用场景
- ✅ 开发和调试新功能
- ✅ 小规模测试（< 50 实例）
- ✅ 离线环境
- ❌ 大规模评测（资源不足）
- ❌ 需要高并行度

### 步骤 1：构建 Docker 镜像

**为什么需要构建镜像？**
每个 SWE-Bench 实例需要特定的环境：
- 特定版本的 Python、依赖库
- 对应仓库的特定 commit
- 预安装的工具和配置

**基础构建命令：**
```bash
uv run python -m benchmarks.swebench.build_images \
  --dataset princeton-nlp/SWE-bench_Verified \
  --split test \
  --image ghcr.io/openhands/eval-agent-server \
  --target source-minimal
```

**参数详解：**
| 参数 | 说明 | 可选值 |
|------|------|--------|
| `--dataset` | 数据集名称 | `SWE-bench`, `SWE-bench_Lite`, `SWE-bench_Verified` |
| `--split` | 数据集分割 | `test`, `dev` |
| `--image` | 基础镜像名称 | 任何有效的镜像名 |
| `--target` | 构建目标 | `source-minimal`（最小化）, `source-full`（完整） |
| `--max-workers` | 并行构建数 | 默认：4 |
| `--n-limit` | 限制构建数量 | 用于测试 |

**高级用法：**

**仅构建特定实例：**
```bash
# 创建实例 ID 列表
cat > instances.txt <<EOF
django__django-11333
django__django-12155
astropy__astropy-12345
EOF

# 构建这些实例
uv run python -m benchmarks.swebench.build_images \
  --dataset princeton-nlp/SWE-bench_Verified \
  --split test \
  --image ghcr.io/openhands/eval-agent-server \
  --select instances.txt
```

**加速构建（更多 worker）：**
```bash
uv run python -m benchmarks.swebench.build_images \
  --dataset princeton-nlp/SWE-bench_Verified \
  --split test \
  --image ghcr.io/openhands/eval-agent-server \
  --max-workers 8  # 根据 CPU 核心数调整
```

**测试构建（只构建前 10 个）：**
```bash
uv run python -m benchmarks.swebench.build_images \
  --dataset princeton-nlp/SWE-bench_Lite \
  --split test \
  --image ghcr.io/openhands/eval-agent-server \
  --n-limit 10
```

**构建进度监控：**
```bash
# 在另一个终端查看镜像
watch -n 5 'docker images | grep eval-agent-server | wc -l'

# 查看 Docker 资源使用
docker system df

# 清理未使用的镜像（释放空间）
docker image prune -f
```

**特殊情况：Sphinx-doc 等需要额外依赖的项目**
某些项目（如 `sphinx-doc`）需要 `docutils<0.21` 和 `roman`。构建脚本会自动处理：
- 自动检测需要额外层的仓库
- 在原镜像基础上添加依赖层
- 保持相同的标签（评估专用）

### 步骤 2：运行推理

**基础推理命令：**
```bash
uv run swebench-infer .llm_config/claude-sonnet.json \
    --dataset princeton-nlp/SWE-bench_Verified \
    --split test \
    --max-iterations 100 \
    --workspace docker
```

**完整参数说明：**
| 参数 | 说明 | 默认值 | 建议值 |
|------|------|--------|--------|
| `<config_file>` | LLM 配置文件路径 | 必需 | - |
| `--dataset` | 数据集 | `SWE-bench_Verified` | - |
| `--split` | 分割 | `test` | - |
| `--max-iterations` | 每实例最大步数 | 100 | 50-200 |
| `--workspace` | 工作空间类型 | `docker` | `docker` / `remote` |
| `--num-workers` | 并行 worker 数 | 1 | 本地: 2-4 |
| `--n-limit` | 限制实例数 | 无限制 | 测试: 10 |
| `--select` | 实例 ID 文件 | None | - |
| `--output-dir` | 输出目录 | `./outputs` | - |

**实际使用示例：**

**快速测试（单实例）：**
```bash
echo "django__django-11333" > test.txt

uv run swebench-infer .llm_config/claude-sonnet.json \
    --select test.txt \
    --max-iterations 50 \
    --workspace docker
```

**小规模评测（10 个实例，2 并行）：**
```bash
uv run swebench-infer .llm_config/claude-sonnet.json \
    --dataset princeton-nlp/SWE-bench_Lite \
    --n-limit 10 \
    --num-workers 2 \
    --max-iterations 100 \
    --workspace docker
```

**完整 Lite 评测：**
```bash
uv run swebench-infer .llm_config/claude-sonnet.json \
    --dataset princeton-nlp/SWE-bench_Lite \
    --num-workers 4 \
    --max-iterations 150 \
    --workspace docker \
    --output-dir ./outputs/lite_full_run
```

**监控推理进度：**
```bash
# 实时查看输出
tail -f outputs/*/agent_logs/*.log

# 查看完成的实例
ls outputs/*/results/ | wc -l

# 监控 Docker 资源
docker stats

# 查看活跃容器
docker ps | grep swebench
```

**输出文件结构：**
```
outputs/
├── run_20250128_143022/          # 带时间戳的运行目录
│   ├── config.json               # 运行配置
│   ├── results/                  # 结果文件
│   │   ├── django__django-11333.json
│   │   └── astropy__astropy-12345.json
│   ├── agent_logs/               # 代理日志
│   │   ├── django__django-11333.log
│   │   └── astropy__astropy-12345.log
│   └── output.jsonl              # 汇总输出（用于评估）
```

## 远程云端评测

### 适用场景
- ✅ 大规模评测（100+ 实例）
- ✅ 需要高并行度（32+ workers）
- ✅ 资源受限的本地环境
- ✅ 生产级基准测试
- ❌ 离线环境
- ❌ 需要完全控制环境

### 远程运行时架构

```
┌──────────────────┐
│  Benchmarks Repo │
│  (评测脚本)       │
└────────┬─────────┘
         │ HTTP API
         ▼
┌──────────────────────────────────────┐
│    Runtime API Service               │
│    (runtime.eval.all-hands.dev)      │
│    - 容器调度                         │
│    - 资源管理                         │
│    - 并行执行                         │
└────────┬─────────────────────────────┘
         │ 拉取镜像
         ▼
┌──────────────────────────────────────┐
│   Container Registry (GHCR)          │
│   ghcr.io/openhands/eval-agent-server│
│   - 预构建镜像                        │
│   - 按 SDK SHA + Instance 标签        │
└──────────────────────────────────────┘
         │
         ▼
┌──────────────────────────────────────┐
│   云端容器集群                         │
│   - Instance 1 容器                   │
│   - Instance 2 容器                   │
│   - ...                              │
│   - Instance N 容器（并行运行）        │
└──────────────────────────────────────┘
```

### 步骤 1：预构建并推送镜像

**为什么需要预构建？**
- 远程 Runtime API 不构建镜像，只拉取现有镜像
- 镜像必须是公开访问的
- 镜像标签必须匹配 SDK SHA 和实例 ID

**镜像标签格式：**
```
ghcr.io/openhands/eval-agent-server:{SDK_SHA}-{INSTANCE_TAG}-source-minimal
```
示例：
```
ghcr.io/openhands/eval-agent-server:79868ae5-django__django-11333-source-minimal
```

#### 方法 1：通过 PR 标签自动构建（推荐）

**步骤详解：**

1. **创建或更新 PR：**
```bash
# 创建新分支
git checkout -b test-swebench-evaluation

# 做一些改动（或空提交）
git commit --allow-empty -m "Trigger SWE-Bench image build"

# 推送并创建 PR
git push origin test-swebench-evaluation
gh pr create --title "Test SWE-Bench Evaluation" --body "Testing image builds"
```

2. **添加构建标签：**

在 GitHub PR 页面，添加以下标签之一：

| 标签 | 构建数量 | 用途 | 预计时间 |
|------|---------|------|---------|
| `build-swebench-50` | 50 个实例 | 快速测试 | 5-10 分钟 |
| `build-swebench-200` | 200 个实例 | 中等规模测试 | 20-40 分钟 |
| `build-swebench` | 全部实例 (~500) | 完整评测 | 1-2 小时 |

3. **监控构建进度：**

```bash
# 查看 GitHub Actions 状态
gh run list --workflow=build-swebench-images.yml

# 查看特定 run 的日志
gh run view <run_id> --log

# 查看构建完成的镜像
gh api repos/OpenHands/benchmarks/issues/81/comments | jq '.[-1].body'
```

4. **验证镜像已推送：**

```bash
# 检查 SDK SHA
cd vendor/software-agent-sdk
SDK_SHA=$(git rev-parse --short HEAD)
echo "SDK SHA: $SDK_SHA"
cd ../..

# 验证镜像存在（需要 GitHub token）
IMAGE="ghcr.io/openhands/eval-agent-server"
INSTANCE="django__django-11333"
TAG="${SDK_SHA}-${INSTANCE}-source-minimal"

docker pull ${IMAGE}:${TAG}
# 如果成功拉取，说明镜像已正确构建和推送
```

#### 方法 2：手动构建和推送

**前置要求：**
```bash
# 登录 GitHub Container Registry
echo $GITHUB_TOKEN | docker login ghcr.io -u USERNAME --password-stdin

# 或使用 GitHub CLI
gh auth token | docker login ghcr.io -u USERNAME --password-stdin
```

**基础构建命令：**
```bash
uv run python -m benchmarks.swebench.build_images \
  --dataset princeton-nlp/SWE-bench_Verified \
  --split test \
  --image ghcr.io/openhands/eval-agent-server \
  --target source-minimal \
  --push \
  --max-workers 32
```

**参数说明：**
- `--push`：构建后自动推送到注册表
- `--max-workers 32`：32 并行构建（根据网络和 CPU 调整）

**高级用法：**

**分批构建（避免超时）：**
```bash
# 第一批：前 100 个
uv run python -m benchmarks.swebench.build_images \
  --dataset princeton-nlp/SWE-bench_Verified \
  --split test \
  --image ghcr.io/openhands/eval-agent-server \
  --n-limit 100 \
  --push \
  --max-workers 16

# 第二批：接下来 100 个（需要修改脚本以支持 offset）
# 或者使用 --select 指定实例列表
```

**只构建特定仓库：**
```bash
# 只构建 Django 相关实例
uv run python -c "
from datasets import load_dataset
ds = load_dataset('princeton-nlp/SWE-bench_Verified', split='test')
django_instances = [x['instance_id'] for x in ds if 'django' in x['repo'].lower()]
with open('django_instances.txt', 'w') as f:
    f.write('\n'.join(django_instances))
"

uv run python -m benchmarks.swebench.build_images \
  --select django_instances.txt \
  --image ghcr.io/openhands/eval-agent-server \
  --push \
  --max-workers 16
```

**构建日志和监控：**
```bash
# 实时监控推送进度
docker images | grep eval-agent-server | wc -l

# 查看注册表使用情况（需要 API 访问）
gh api user/packages/container/eval-agent-server/versions \
  | jq '.[].metadata.container.tags[]' \
  | grep "79868ae5"  # 你的 SDK SHA

# 清理本地镜像（释放空间）
docker images | grep eval-agent-server | awk '{print $3}' | xargs docker rmi -f
```

### 步骤 2：设置环境变量

**必需变量：**
```bash
# Runtime API 密钥（联系 OpenHands 团队获取）
export RUNTIME_API_KEY="your-runtime-api-key-here"
```

**可选变量：**
```bash
# 自定义 Runtime API 端点
export RUNTIME_API_URL="https://runtime.eval.all-hands.dev"

# 覆盖 SDK SHA（通常自动检测）
export SDK_SHORT_SHA="79868ae5"

# 调试模式
export OPENHANDS_DEBUG=1

# 超时设置（秒）
export RUNTIME_TIMEOUT=3600
```

**环境变量持久化：**
```bash
# 添加到 ~/.bashrc 或 ~/.zshrc
cat >> ~/.bashrc <<'EOF'
# OpenHands Runtime API
export RUNTIME_API_KEY="your-key-here"
export RUNTIME_API_URL="https://runtime.eval.all-hands.dev"
EOF

source ~/.bashrc
```

**验证配置：**
```bash
# 检查环境变量
env | grep RUNTIME

# 测试 API 连通性
curl -H "Authorization: Bearer $RUNTIME_API_KEY" \
     $RUNTIME_API_URL/health

# 验证 SDK SHA
cd vendor/software-agent-sdk
git rev-parse --short HEAD
cd ../..
```

### 步骤 3：运行远程推理

**基础命令：**
```bash
uv run swebench-infer .llm_config/claude-sonnet.json \
    --dataset princeton-nlp/SWE-bench_Verified \
    --split test \
    --workspace remote \
    --num-workers 32 \
    --max-iterations 500
```

**实际使用场景：**

**场景 1：快速验证（2-3 个实例）**
```bash
cat > quick_test.txt <<EOF
django__django-11333
astropy__astropy-12345
EOF

uv run swebench-infer .llm_config/claude-sonnet.json \
    --select quick_test.txt \
    --workspace remote \
    --num-workers 2 \
    --max-iterations 300 \
    --output-dir ./outputs/quick_test
```

**场景 2：中等规模测试（50 实例）**
```bash
uv run swebench-infer .llm_config/claude-sonnet.json \
    --dataset princeton-nlp/SWE-bench_Verified \
    --n-limit 50 \
    --workspace remote \
    --num-workers 16 \
    --max-iterations 400 \
    --output-dir ./outputs/medium_test_50
```

**场景 3：大规模评测（全部 Verified 数据集）**
```bash
uv run swebench-infer .llm_config/claude-sonnet.json \
    --dataset princeton-nlp/SWE-bench_Verified \
    --workspace remote \
    --num-workers 64 \
    --max-iterations 500 \
    --output-dir ./outputs/full_verified_run_$(date +%Y%m%d)
```

**场景 4：仅评测失败实例（重试）**
```bash
# 从之前的运行中提取失败实例
uv run python -c "
import json
failed = []
with open('outputs/previous_run/output.jsonl') as f:
    for line in f:
        data = json.loads(line)
        if not data.get('success', False):
            failed.append(data['instance_id'])

with open('failed_instances.txt', 'w') as f:
    f.write('\n'.join(failed))
print(f'Found {len(failed)} failed instances')
"

# 重新评测失败实例
uv run swebench-infer .llm_config/claude-sonnet.json \
    --select failed_instances.txt \
    --workspace remote \
    --num-workers 32 \
    --max-iterations 600 \  # 给失败实例更多步数
    --output-dir ./outputs/retry_failed
```

**并行度建议：**
| 数据集规模 | 推荐 workers | API 配额要求 | 预计时间 |
|-----------|-------------|-------------|---------|
| 1-10 实例 | 2-4 | 基础 | 30-60 分钟 |
| 10-50 实例 | 8-16 | 标准 | 1-3 小时 |
| 50-200 实例 | 16-32 | 高级 | 3-8 小时 |
| 200+ 实例 | 32-64 | 企业 | 8-24 小时 |

**监控运行状态：**

```bash
# 实时查看进度
tail -f outputs/*/agent_logs/*.log

# 统计完成数量
ls outputs/*/results/*.json | wc -l

# 查看 API 使用情况（如果有仪表板）
# 访问 https://runtime.eval.all-hands.dev/dashboard

# 检查是否有挂起的实例
grep -r "TIMEOUT\|ERROR" outputs/*/agent_logs/

# 计算成功率
uv run python -c "
import json
total = success = 0
with open('outputs/current_run/output.jsonl') as f:
    for line in f:
        data = json.loads(line)
        total += 1
        if data.get('success'): success += 1
print(f'Success rate: {success}/{total} ({100*success/total:.1f}%)')
"
```

**优雅停止运行：**
```bash
# 发送 Ctrl+C 后等待当前实例完成
# 脚本会保存已完成的结果

# 强制停止（不推荐）
pkill -9 -f swebench-infer

# 从断点恢复（需要记录已完成实例）
# 创建剩余实例列表
comm -23 <(sort all_instances.txt) <(sort completed_instances.txt) > remaining.txt

# 继续运行
uv run swebench-infer .llm_config/claude-sonnet.json \
    --select remaining.txt \
    --workspace remote \
    --num-workers 32
```

## 结果评估

### 评估流程

推理完成后，需要使用官方 SWE-Bench 评估脚本来验证生成的补丁。

**评估流程图：**
```
推理输出 (output.jsonl)
    │
    ▼
格式转换（OpenHands → SWE-Bench）
    │
    ▼
应用补丁到测试环境
    │
    ▼
运行单元测试
    │
    ▼
生成评估报告 (results.swebench.jsonl)
```

### 基础评估

**最简单的评估：**
```bash
uv run swebench-eval outputs/run_20250128/output.jsonl
```

**带自定义参数：**
```bash
uv run swebench-eval outputs/run_20250128/output.jsonl \
  --dataset princeton-nlp/SWE-bench_Verified \
  --output-file results_20250128.jsonl
```

**仅格式转换（不运行测试）：**
```bash
uv run swebench-eval outputs/run_20250128/output.jsonl \
  --skip-evaluation \
  --output-file predictions_only.jsonl
```

### 高级评估选项

**并行评估（加速）：**
```bash
uv run swebench-eval outputs/run_
如果我后续想在openhands中加入搜索算法提升其在swe-bench上的表现，可以使用远程云端测评吗

## ✅ 可行性分析

**完全可以使用远程云端评测**，这正是远程评测的设计目的之一——支持算法改进和大规模实验。

## 🔄 完整工作流程

### 方案 1：修改 Benchmarks 代码（推荐用于搜索算法）

如果你的搜索算法主要在**评测层面**实现（比如 beam search、MCTS 等控制推理流程的算法）：

```bash
# 1. Fork 并克隆 benchmarks 仓库
git clone https://github.com/YOUR_USERNAME/benchmarks.git
cd benchmarks

# 2. 创建功能分支
git checkout -b feat/add-beam-search

# 3. 在 benchmarks/swebench/ 中实现搜索算法
# 例如修改：
#   - benchmarks/swebench/run_infer.py (添加搜索逻辑)
#   - benchmarks/utils/inference.py (扩展推理框架)

# 4. 本地测试（小规模）
uv run swebench-infer .llm_config/test.json \
    --dataset princeton-nlp/SWE-bench_Verified \
    --n-limit 3 \
    --workspace docker \
    --search-algorithm beam \
    --beam-width 5  # 你的自定义参数

# 5. 提交代码
git add .
git commit -m "Add beam search algorithm for SWE-Bench"
git push origin feat/add-beam-search

# 6. 创建 PR 并触发镜像构建
gh pr create --title "Add beam search for SWE-Bench" \
             --body "Implements beam search to improve solution quality"

# 7. 添加标签触发镜像构建
# 在 GitHub PR 页面添加标签：build-swebench-200

# 8. 等待镜像构建完成（20-40分钟）
gh run watch

# 9. 运行远程评测
export RUNTIME_API_KEY="your-key"

uv run swebench-infer .llm_config/claude-sonnet.json \
    --dataset princeton-nlp/SWE-bench_Verified \
    --workspace remote \
    --num-workers 32 \
    --search-algorithm beam \
    --beam-width 5 \
    --output-dir ./outputs/beam_search_w5
```

### 方案 2：修改 SDK 代码（用于核心 Agent 改进）

如果你的搜索算法需要修改**Agent 核心逻辑**（比如修改 Agent 的决策机制、状态管理等）：

```bash
# 1. 克隆 benchmarks（包含 SDK submodule）
git clone https://github.com/YOUR_USERNAME/benchmarks.git
cd benchmarks
git submodule update --init --recursive

# 2. 进入 SDK submodule
cd vendor/software-agent-sdk

# 3. 创建 SDK 功能分支
git checkout -b feat/agent-search-algorithm

# 4. 修改 SDK 核心代码
# 例如：
#   - openhands/sdk/agent/base_agent.py (添加搜索逻辑)
#   - openhands/sdk/runtime/action.py (扩展动作空间)

# 5. 提交 SDK 改动
git add .
git commit -m "Add search algorithm to agent core"
git push origin feat/agent-search-algorithm

# 6. 在 SDK 仓库创建 PR
cd ../..  # 回到 benchmarks 根目录

# 7. 更新 benchmarks 的 submodule 指向
cd vendor/software-agent-sdk
git checkout feat/agent-search-algorithm
cd ../..
git add vendor/software-agent-sdk
git commit -m "Update SDK submodule to use search algorithm branch"

# 8. 推送 benchmarks 改动
git push origin main  # 或你的功能分支

# 9. 在 benchmarks 仓库创建 PR 并触发构建
gh pr create --repo YOUR_USERNAME/benchmarks \
             --title "Evaluate SDK with search algorithm" \
             --body "Testing new search algorithm from SDK PR#123"

# 10. 添加构建标签（重要！）
# 在 PR 页面添加：build-swebench-200

# 11. 等待镜像构建（会使用你的 SDK 分支）
gh run watch

# 12. 运行远程评测
uv run swebench-infer .llm_config/claude-sonnet.json \
    --workspace remote \
    --num-workers 32
```

---

## 🔑 关键技术点

### 1. 镜像构建会包含你的代码

当你添加 `build-swebench-*` 标签时，GitHub Actions 会：

```yaml
# .github/workflows/build-swebench-images.yml 的关键部分
- name: Checkout code
  uses: actions/checkout@v4
  with:
    ref: ${{ github.event.pull_request.head.sha }}  # ✓ 使用你的 PR 代码
    submodules: recursive

- name: Build agent server image
  run: |
    # 构建时会包含你的 SDK 改动
    cd vendor/software-agent-sdk
    docker build -t agent-server:$SDK_SHA .
```

**这意味着**：
- ✅ 镜像会包含你的搜索算法代码
- ✅ 远程评测会运行你的改进版本
- ✅ 完全隔离的测试环境

### 2. 自定义参数传递

你可以通过命令行参数传递搜索算法配置：

```python
# benchmarks/swebench/run_infer.py
import argparse

def parse_args():
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser()
    # ... 现有参数 ...
    
    # 添加搜索算法参数
    parser.add_argument('--search-algorithm', 
                       choices=['greedy', 'beam', 'mcts', 'astar'],
                       default='greedy')
    parser.add_argument('--beam-width', type=int, default=3)
    parser.add_argument('--search-depth', type=int, default=10)
    parser.add_argument('--exploration-weight', type=float, default=1.0)
    
    return parser.parse_args()

def run_inference(args):
    # 根据参数初始化搜索算法
    if args.search_algorithm == 'beam':
        agent = BeamSearchAgent(
            beam_width=args.beam_width,
            max_depth=args.search_depth
        )
    elif args.search_algorithm == 'mcts':
        agent = MCTSAgent(
            exploration_weight=args.exploration_weight
        )
    # ... 运行推理
```

## ⚠️ 重要注意事项

### 1. 镜像重建触发条件

**何时需要重建镜像？**

| 改动类型 | 需要重建镜像 | 原因 |
|---------|------------|------|
| 修改 `benchmarks/swebench/run_infer.py` | ❌ 不需要 | 推理脚本在宿主机运行 |
| 修改 SDK Agent 核心代码 | ✅ **需要** | Agent 运行在容器内 |
| 修改环境依赖（requirements.txt） | ✅ **需要** | 容器依赖改变 |
| 修改 LLM 配置 | ❌ 不需要 | 配置文件在宿主机 |
| 更新 SDK submodule commit | ✅ **需要** | SDK 版本改变 |

**触发重建的方法**：
```bash
# 方法 1：在 PR 上添加/删除/重新添加标签
# GitHub UI: Labels -> 移除 build-swebench-200 -> 重新添加

# 方法 2：推送新的 commit
git commit --allow-empty -m "Trigger image rebuild"
git push

# 方法 3：手动触发 workflow（如果有权限）
gh workflow run build-swebench-images.yml \
  --ref your-branch \
  -f instance_limit=200
```

### 2. 成本考虑

远程评测的成本主要来自：
- **API 调用**：LLM tokens 使用
- **容器运行时间**：按小时计费
- **并行度**：worker 数量

**优化建议**：

```bash
# 阶段 1：小规模验证（低成本）
uv run swebench-infer .llm_config/claude-sonnet.json \
    --n-limit 10 \
    --workspace remote \
    --num-workers 2 \
    --search-algorithm beam \
    --beam-width 3

# 阶段 2：中等规模测试（中等成本）
uv run swebench-infer .llm_config/claude-sonnet.json \
    --n-limit 50 \
    --workspace remote \
    --num-workers 16 \
    --search-algorithm beam \
    --beam-width 3

# 阶段 3：完整评测（高成本）
# 只在前两个阶段验证有效后执行
uv run swebench-infer .llm_config/claude-sonnet.json \
    --workspace remote \
    --num-workers 64 \
    --search-algorithm beam \
    --beam-width 3
```

**成本估算示例**（假设）：
- SWE-bench_Verified: ~500 实例
- 每实例平均 500 iterations
- Claude Sonnet 4: $3/M input tokens, $15/M output tokens
- 平均每 iteration: 2K input + 500 output tokens

```python
# 粗略估算
instances = 500
iterations_per_instance = 500
input_tokens = 2000
output_tokens = 500

total_cost = instances * iterations_per_instance * (
    (input_tokens / 1_000_000 * 3) +  # 输入成本
    (output_tokens / 1_000_000 * 15)  # 输出成本
)
print(f"预估成本: ${total_cost:.2f}")
# 约 $3,375（仅 LLM 成本）
```

### 3. 调试策略

**本地先调试，远程再扩展**：

```bash
# 步骤 1：本地 Docker 调试（免费）
uv run swebench-infer .llm_config/test.json \
    --n-limit 1 \
    --workspace docker \
    --search-algorithm beam \
    --beam-width 3 \
    --max-iterations 50

# 步骤 2：远程小规模验证（低成本）
uv run swebench-infer .llm_config/claude-sonnet.json \
    --n-limit 5 \
    --workspace remote \
    --num-workers 2 \
    --search-algorithm beam \
    --beam-width 3

# 步骤 3：远程中等规模（中等成本）
uv run swebench-infer .llm_config/claude-sonnet.json \
    --n-limit 50 \
    --workspace remote \
    --num-workers 16 \
    --search-algorithm beam \
    --beam-width 3

# 步骤 4：远程完整评测（高成本）
uv run swebench-infer .llm_config/claude-sonnet.json \
    --workspace remote \
    --num-workers 64 \
    --search-algorithm beam \
    --beam-width 3
```

### 4. 版本兼容性

确保你的搜索算法与 SDK 版本兼容：

```bash
# 检查当前 SDK 版本
cd vendor/software-agent-sdk
git log -1 --oneline
# 输出: 79868ae5 Add critic module

# 如果你的搜索算法依赖特定 SDK 功能
# 在 benchmarks/swebench/README.md 中记录最低版本要求
cat >> benchmarks/swebench/README.md <<EOF

## Search Algorithm Requirements
- Beam Search: Requires SDK >= 79868ae5 (critic module)
- MCTS: Requires SDK >= abc12345 (state rollback support)
EOF
```

## 📊 结果分析建议

运行完评测后，分析搜索算法的效果：

```python
# analyze_search_results.py
import json
import pandas as pd

def compare_runs(baseline_file, experiment_file):
    """对比 baseline 和实验结果"""
    
    def load_results(file):
        results = {}
        with open(file) as f:
            for line in f:
                data = json.loads(line)
                results[data['instance_id']] = {
                    'success': data.get('success', False),
                    'iterations': data.get('iterations', 0),
                    'cost': data.get('cost', 0)
                }
        return results
    
    baseline = load_results(baseline_file)
    experiment = load_results(experiment_file)
    
    # 计算指标
    common_instances = set(baseline.keys()) & set(experiment.keys())
    
    baseline_success = sum(baseline[i]['success'] for i in common_instances)
    experiment_success = sum(experiment[i]['success'] for i in common_instances)
    
    print(f"Common instances: {len(common_instances)}")
    print(f"Baseline success: {baseline_success}/{len(common_instances)} ({100*baseline_success/len(common_instances):.1f}%)")
    print(f"Experiment success: {experiment_success}/{len(common_instances)} ({100*experiment_success/len(common_instances):.1f}%)")
    print(f"Improvement: +{experiment_success - baseline_success} instances")
    
    # 详细对比
    improved = []
    regressed = []
    
    for instance in common_instances:
        b_success = baseline[instance]['success']
        e_success = experiment[instance]['success']
        
        if not b_success and e_success:
            improved.append(instance)
        elif b_success and not e_success:
            regressed.append(instance)
    
    print(f"\nImproved: {len(improved)} instances")
    print(f"Regressed: {len(regressed)} instances")
    
    if improved:
        print("\nTop improved instances:")
        for i in improved[:5]:
            print(f"  - {i}")
    
    return improved, regressed

# 使用
improved, regressed = compare_runs(
    'outputs/baseline_greedy/output.jsonl',
    'outputs/beam_w5/output.jsonl'
)
```

## 🎯 总结

**是的，完全可以用远程云端评测来测试你的搜索算法改进！**

**推荐流程**：
1. 本地 Docker 小规模调试（1-3 实例）
2. 创建 PR 并添加 `build-swebench-50` 标签
3. 远程评测小规模验证（10-50 实例）
4. 分析结果，调整参数
5. 添加 `build-swebench-200` 标签
6. 远程评测中等规模（100-200 实例）
7. 确认有效后，完整评测（500 实例）

**优势**：
- ✅ 无需本地大量资源
- ✅ 高并行度（32-64 workers）
- ✅ 可重复的评测环境
- ✅ 支持 A/B 对比实验

**需要注意**：
- ⚠️ SDK 改动需要重建镜像
- ⚠️ 控制评测规模以管理成本
- ⚠️ 保持 SDK 版本兼容性
- ⚠️ 充分的本地调试后再远程扩展

祝你的搜索算法改进顺利！🚀
我要加入的是MCTS，告诉我该选取哪种评测方法（本地还是云端）。并告诉在选取的方法上该怎么快速地跑10到20个任务验证是否能工作，先不加入MCTS，只验证openhands

# MCTS 评测方案建议

## 🎯 推荐方案：**本地 Docker 评测**

### 为什么选本地而不是云端？

| 考虑因素 | 本地 Docker | 远程云端 | 推荐 |
|---------|------------|---------|------|
| **初期调试** | ✅ 即时反馈，快速迭代 | ❌ 需要构建镜像(20-40分钟) | 本地 |
| **MCTS 调试** | ✅ 可以实时查看搜索树 | ❌ 日志延迟，难以调试 | 本地 |
| **成本** | ✅ 完全免费 | ❌ API 费用 | 本地 |
| **灵活性** | ✅ 随时修改代码重跑 | ❌ 每次改动需重建镜像 | 本地 |
| **10-20 任务验证** | ✅ 30分钟-2小时 | ⚠️ 10分钟+镜像构建时间 | 本地 |
| **大规模评测(500+)** | ❌ 需要几天 | ✅ 几小时完成 | 云端 |

**结论：先用本地验证功能，确认 MCTS 有效后再迁移到云端做大规模评测。**

## 📊 监控和调试技巧

### 实时监控脚本

创建一个监控脚本 `monitor.sh`：

```bash
#!/bin/bash
# monitor.sh - 实时监控推理进度

OUTPUT_DIR=${1:-"./outputs"}

watch -n 5 '
echo "=== OpenHands SWE-Bench 监控 ==="
echo ""
echo "📁 输出目录: '"$OUTPUT_DIR"'"
echo ""

# 找到最新的运行目录
LATEST_RUN=$(ls -td '"$OUTPUT_DIR"'/run_* 2>/dev/null | head -1)

if [ -z "$LATEST_RUN" ]; then
    echo "❌ 未找到运行目录"
    exit 0
fi

echo "📂 当前运行: $(basename $LATEST_RUN)"
echo ""

# 统计完成数量
RESULTS_DIR="$LATEST_RUN/results"
if [ -d "$RESULTS_DIR" ]; then
    COMPLETED=$(ls "$RESULTS_DIR"/*.json 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
    echo "✅ 已完成: $COMPLETED 个实例"
else
    echo "⏳ 等待结果..."
fi

# 显示最近的日志
LOG_DIR="$LATEST_RUN/agent_logs"
if [ -d "$LOG_DIR" ]; then
    LATEST_LOG=$(ls -t "$LOG_DIR"/*.log 2>/dev/null | head -1)
    if [ ! -z "$LATEST_LOG" ]; then
        echo ""
        echo "📝 最新日志 ($(basename $LATEST_LOG)):"
        echo "---"
        tail -n 3 "$LATEST_LOG" 2>/dev/null | sed "s/^/  /"
    fi
fi

# Docker 资源使用
echo ""
echo "🐳 Docker 状态:"
CONTAINERS=$(docker ps --filter "name=swe" --format "{{.Names}}" 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
echo "  活跃容器: $CONTAINERS"
echo ""
echo "💾 磁盘使用:"
docker system df --format "table {{.Type}}\t{{.TotalCount}}\t{{.Size}}" 2>/dev/null | grep -E "Images|Containers" | sed "s/^/  /"
'
```

使用监控脚本：

```bash
# 给予执行权限
chmod +x monitor.sh

# 在单独的终端运行
./monitor.sh ./outputs/baseline_validation_10
```

### 详细日志查看

```bash
# 查看特定实例的完整日志
tail -f outputs/baseline_validation_10/*/agent_logs/django__django-11333.log

# 查看所有实例的错误
grep -r "ERROR\|FAILED\|Exception" outputs/baseline_validation_10/*/agent_logs/

# 查看推理统计
uv run python - <<EOF
import json
import os
from pathlib import Path

output_dir = Path("outputs/baseline_validation_10")
results_dir = list(output_dir.glob("run_*/results"))

if results_dir:
    results_dir = results_dir[0]
    results = list(results_dir.glob("*.json"))
    
    print(f"📊 已完成实例: {len(results)}")
    
    for result_file in sorted(results)[:5]:  # 显示前 5 个
        with open(result_file) as f:
            data = json.load(f)
            instance_id = data.get('instance_id', 'Unknown')
            success = data.get('test_result', {}).get('resolved', False)
            iterations = len(data.get('history', []))
            print(f"  {'✅' if success else '❌'} {instance_id}: {iterations} iterations")
else:
    print("⏳ 还没有完成的实例")
EOF

## 🧪 完整验证流程示例

这是一个完整的端到端验证脚本：

```bash
#!/bin/bash
# validate_openhands.sh - 完整验证流程

set -e  # 遇到错误立即退出

echo "🚀 OpenHands SWE-Bench 验证流程"
echo "================================"

# 1. 环境检查
echo ""
echo "1️⃣ 检查环境..."
command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo "❌ Docker 未安装"; exit 1; }
command -v uv >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo "❌ uv 未安装"; exit 1; }
echo "✅ 环境检查通过"

# 2. 构建环境
echo ""
echo "2️⃣ 构建环境..."
make build

# 3. 验证 LLM 配置
echo ""
echo "3️⃣ 验证 LLM 配置..."
if [ ! -f ".llm_config/test.json" ]; then
    echo "❌ 请先创建 .llm_config/test.json"
    exit 1
fi
uv run validate-cfg .llm_config/test.json
echo "✅ LLM 配置有效"

# 4. 创建测试实例列表
echo ""
echo "4️⃣ 创建测试实例列表..."
cat > quick_test.txt <<EOF
django__django-11333
django__django-12286
astropy__astropy-14182
EOF

NUM_INSTANCES=$(wc -l < quick_test.txt)
echo "✅ 选择了 $NUM_INSTANCES 个测试实例"

# 5. 构建镜像
echo ""

uv run python -m benchmarks.swebench.build_images \
  --dataset princeton-nlp/SWE-bench_Verified \
  --split test \
  --select quick_test.txt \
  --image ghcr.io/openhands/eval-agent-server \
  --target source-minimal \
  --max-workers 2

echo "✅ 镜像构建完成"

# 6. 运行推理
echo ""
echo "6️⃣ 运行推理（预计 15-30 分钟）..."
OUTPUT_DIR="./outputs/validation_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S)"

uv run swebench-infer .llm_config/test.json \
    --select quick_test.txt \
    --workspace docker \
    --max-iterations 50 \
    --num-workers 2 \
    --output-dir "$OUTPUT_DIR" &

INFER_PID=$!

# 7. 监控进度
echo ""
echo "7️⃣ 监控进度（Ctrl+C 退出监控，推理继续运行）..."
echo "   推理进程 PID: $INFER_PID"
echo "   输出目录: $OUTPUT_DIR"
echo ""

while kill -0 $INFER_PID 2>/dev/null; do
    clear
    echo "=== 实时进度 ==="
    echo ""
    
    RUN_DIR=$(ls -td "$OUTPUT_DIR"/run_* 2>/dev/null | head -1)
    if [ ! -z "$RUN_DIR" ]; then
        COMPLETED=$(ls "$RUN_DIR/results"/*.json 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
        echo "✅ 已完成: $COMPLETED / $NUM_INSTANCES"
        
        if [ -d "$RUN_DIR/agent_logs" ]; then
            LATEST_LOG=$(ls -t "$RUN_DIR/agent_logs"/*.log 2>/dev/null | head -1)
            if [ ! -z "$LATEST_LOG" ]; then
                echo ""
                echo "📝 最新日志 ($(basename $LATEST_LOG)):"
                tail -n 5 "$LATEST_LOG" | sed 's/^/  /'
            fi
        fi
    fi
    
    sleep 10
done

wait $INFER_PID
INFER_EXIT_CODE=$?

echo ""
if [ $INFER_EXIT_CODE -eq 0 ]; then
    echo "✅ 推理完成！"
else
    echo "❌ 推理失败，退出码: $INFER_EXIT_CODE"
    exit $INFER_EXIT_CODE
fi

# 8. 分析结果
echo ""
echo "8️⃣ 分析结果..."
uv run python - <<PYTHON
import json
from pathlib import Path

output_dir = Path("$OUTPUT_DIR")
run_dirs = list(output_dir.glob("run_*"))

if run_dirs:
    run_dir = run_dirs[0]
    results_dir = run_dir / "results"
    results = list(results_dir.glob("*.json"))
    
    print(f"📊 完成统计:")
    print(f"  总实例数: $NUM_INSTANCES")
    print(f"  已完成: {len(results)}")
    
    success_count = 0
    for result_file in results:
        with open(result_file) as f:
            data = json.load(f)
            if data.get('test_result', {}).get('resolved', False):
                success_count += 1
    
    print(f"  成功解决: {success_count}")
    print(f"  成功率: {100*success_count/len(results):.1f}%")
    
    print("")
    print("📝 详细结果:")
    for result_file in sorted(results):
        with open(result_file) as f:
            data = json.load(f)
            instance_id = data.get('instance_id', 'Unknown')
            success = data.get('test_result', {}).get('resolved', False)
            iterations = len(data.get('history', []))
            print(f"  {'✅' if success else '❌'} {instance_id}: {iterations} iterations")
else:
    print("❌ 未找到结果")
PYTHON

echo ""
echo "🎉 验证完成！"
echo "   输出目录: $OUTPUT_DIR"
```

保存为 `validate_openhands.sh` 并运行：

```bash
chmod +x validate_openhands.sh
./validate_openhands.sh
```

## 🔍 如何确认正在正常工作

### 方法 1：等待 1-2 分钟观察

如果正常，你会看到：
- ✅ 数据集加载信息
- ✅ 实例列表
- ✅ Docker 构建日志

如果**卡住了**（超过 5 分钟没有新输出），可能是：
- ❌ 网络问题（下载数据集失败）
- ❌ 权限问题（Docker 权限）

### 方法 2：在另一个终端检查 Docker

打开新终端运行：

```bash
# 监控 Docker 镜像构建
watch -n 2 'docker images | grep eval-agent-server | tail -n 5'

# 查看 Docker 构建进程
docker ps -a | grep build

# 监控 Docker 资源使用
docker stats --no-stream
```

### 方法 3：检查进程状态

```bash
# 查看 Python 进程
ps aux | grep "build_images"

# 查看网络活动（是否在下载数据集）
nethogs  # 需要安装: sudo apt install nethogs
# 或者
iftop    # 需要安装: sudo apt install iftop
```

---

## 🐛 如果卡住了怎么办

### 场景 1：停在 "symbolic-ref" 命令后超过 5 分钟

**可能原因**：数据集下载慢

**解决方案**：
```bash
# 1. 先 Ctrl+C 停止

# 2. 手动预下载数据集
uv run python -c "
from datasets import load_dataset
print('Downloading dataset...')
ds = load_dataset('princeton-nlp/SWE-bench_Verified', split='test')
print(f'Downloaded {len(ds)} instances')
"

# 3. 重新运行构建命令
uv run python -m benchmarks.swebench.build_images \
  --dataset princeton-nlp/SWE-bench_Verified \
  --split test \
  --image ghcr.io/openhands/eval-agent-server \
  --target source-minimal \
  --select test_instances.txt \
  --max-workers 4
```

### 场景 2：Docker 权限错误

**错误表现**：
```
permission denied while trying to connect to the Docker daemon socket
```

**解决方案**：
```bash
# 添加当前用户到 docker 组
sudo usermod -aG docker $USER

# 重新登录或运行
newgrp docker

# 测试 Docker 权限
docker ps
```

### 场景 3：网络连接问题

**解决方案**：
```bash
# 1. 测试网络连接
ping -c 3 huggingface.co
curl -I https://huggingface.co

# 2. 如果在国内，可能需要配置代理
export http_proxy=http://your-proxy:port
export https_proxy=http://your-proxy:port

# 或者使用 HuggingFace 镜像
export HF_ENDPOINT=https://hf-mirror.com
```

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
Build agent-server images for all unique SWE-Bench base images in a dataset split,
optionally wrapping them with a lightweight layer that pins docutils<0.21 and installs roman.

Example:
  uv run benchmarks/swebench/build_images.py \
    --dataset princeton-nlp/SWE-bench_Verified --split test \
    --image ghcr.io/openhands/eval-agent-server --target source-minimal
"""

import sys
from pathlib import Path

from benchmarks.swebench import constants
from benchmarks.swebench.config import BUILD_DEFAULTS
from benchmarks.utils.build_utils import (
    BuildOutput,
    build_all_images,
    default_build_output_dir,
    get_build_parser,
    run_docker_build_layer,
)
from benchmarks.utils.dataset import get_dataset
from benchmarks.utils.image_utils import image_exists
from openhands.sdk import get_logger


logger = get_logger(__name__)
WRAPPER_DOCKERFILE = Path(__file__).with_name("Dockerfile.swebench-deps")


def get_official_docker_image(
    instance_id: str,
    docker_image_prefix: str = constants.DOCKER_IMAGE_PREFIX,
) -> str:
    # Official SWE-Bench image
    # swebench/sweb.eval.x86_64.django_1776_django-11333:v1
    repo, name = instance_id.split("__")
    official_image_name = docker_image_prefix.rstrip("/")
    official_image_name += (
        f"/sweb.eval.x86_64.{repo}_1776_{name}:{constants.DOCKER_IMAGE_TAG}".lower()
    )
    logger.debug(f"Official SWE-Bench image: {official_image_name}")
    return official_image_name


def extract_custom_tag(base_image: str) -> str:
    """
    Extract SWE-Bench instance ID from official SWE-Bench image name.

    Example:
        docker.io/swebench/sweb.eval.x86_64.django_1776_django-12155:latest
        -> sweb.eval.x86_64.django_1776_django-12155
    """
    name_tag = base_image.split("/")[-1]
    name = name_tag.split(":")[0]
    return name


def should_wrap_custom_tag(custom_tag: str) -> bool:
    prefix = "sweb.eval.x86_64."
    if custom_tag.startswith(prefix):
        custom_tag = custom_tag[len(prefix) :]
    return custom_tag.split("_", 1)[0] in constants.WRAPPED_REPOS


def should_wrap_instance_id(instance_id: str) -> bool:
    repo = instance_id.split("__")[0]
    return repo in constants.WRAPPED_REPOS


def collect_unique_base_images(
    dataset,
    split,
    n_limit,
    selected_instances_file: str | None = None,
):
    df = get_dataset(
        dataset_name=dataset,
        split=split,
        eval_limit=n_limit if n_limit else None,
        selected_instances_file=selected_instances_file,
    )
    return sorted(
        {get_official_docker_image(str(row["instance_id"])) for _, row in df.iterrows()}
    )


def wrap_image(agent_image: str, push: bool = False) -> BuildOutput:
    """
    Wrap an agent-server image with pinned docutils/roman.

    For pushes, verify the base tag exists in the registry. For local builds,
    assume the tag is available locally or resolvable by Docker during buildx.
    """
    if push and not image_exists(agent_image):
        return BuildOutput(
            base_image=agent_image,
            tags=[],
            error=(
                f"Agent-server image {agent_image} not found in registry. "
                "Build and push it before wrapping."
            ),
        )

    if not WRAPPER_DOCKERFILE.exists():
        return BuildOutput(
            base_image=agent_image,
            tags=[],
            error=f"Wrapper Dockerfile not found at {WRAPPER_DOCKERFILE}",
        )

    logger.info("Wrapping %s in-place", agent_image)

    return run_docker_build_layer(
        dockerfile=WRAPPER_DOCKERFILE,
        context=WRAPPER_DOCKERFILE.parent,
        tags=[agent_image],
        build_args={"SDK_IMAGE": agent_image},
        push=push,
        platform="linux/amd64",
        load=not push,
    )


def _wrap_if_needed(result: BuildOutput, push: bool) -> BuildOutput:
    """
    Post-build callback that wraps images for repos that need docutils/roman.

    This is passed to build_all_images as post_build_fn, integrating wrapping
    into the main build pass with automatic retry support.
    """
    if not result.tags:
        return result

    agent_image = result.tags[0]
    # Extract custom tag from the built image tag to check if wrapping is needed
    # Format: ghcr.io/openhands/eval-agent-server:SHA-sweb.eval.x86_64.REPO_...-target
    tag_part = agent_image.split(":")[-1] if ":" in agent_image else ""
    # Remove SDK SHA prefix and target suffix to get the custom tag
    parts = tag_part.split("-", 1)
    custom_tag = parts[1].rsplit("-", 1)[0] if len(parts) > 1 else tag_part

    if not should_wrap_custom_tag(custom_tag):
        return result

    logger.info("Image %s needs wrapping, applying docutils/roman layer", agent_image)
    wrap_result = wrap_image(agent_image, push)
    if wrap_result.error:
        return BuildOutput(
            base_image=result.base_image,
            tags=result.tags,
            error=f"Wrapping failed: {wrap_result.error}",
        )

    return result


def main(argv: list[str]) -> int:
    parser = get_build_parser()
    parser.set_defaults(**BUILD_DEFAULTS)
    args = parser.parse_args(argv)

    base_images: list[str] = collect_unique_base_images(
        args.dataset,
        args.split,
        args.n_limit,
        args.select,
    )
    build_dir = default_build_output_dir(args.dataset, args.split)

    return build_all_images(
        base_images=base_images,
        target=args.target,
        build_dir=build_dir,
        image=args.image,
        push=args.push,
        max_workers=args.max_workers,
        dry_run=args.dry_run,
        max_retries=args.max_retries,
        base_image_to_custom_tag_fn=extract_custom_tag,
        post_build_fn=_wrap_if_needed,
    )


if __name__ == "__main__":
    sys.exit(main(sys.argv[1:]))
这是build_images.py的代码，它做了什么

# 📝 `build_images.py` 代码详解

这个脚本是 **SWE-Bench 镜像构建的核心入口**，负责为数据集中的每个实例构建专用的 Docker 镜像。让我逐步解析：

---

## 🎯 核心功能

### 主要目标
为 SWE-Bench 数据集中的每个任务实例构建两层 Docker 镜像：
1. **基础层**：官方 SWE-Bench 环境镜像（特定 Python 版本、依赖、代码库）
2. **Agent 层**：在基础镜像上添加 OpenHands Agent SDK
3. **（可选）包装层**：为特定仓库（如 sphinx-doc）添加额外依赖

---

## 🔍 关键函数解析

### 1. `get_official_docker_image()` - 生成官方镜像名

```python
def get_official_docker_image(
    instance_id: str,
    docker_image_prefix: str = constants.DOCKER_IMAGE_PREFIX,
) -> str:
    # 输入: "django__django-11333"
    # 输出: "docker.io/swebench/sweb.eval.x86_64.django_1776_django-11333:latest"
    
    repo, name = instance_id.split("__")  # "django", "django-11333"
    official_image_name = docker_image_prefix.rstrip("/")
    official_image_name += (
        f"/sweb.eval.x86_64.{repo}_1776_{name}:{constants.DOCKER_IMAGE_TAG}".lower()
    )
    return official_image_name
```

**作用**：将实例 ID 转换为标准的 SWE-Bench Docker 镜像名称。

**示例映射**：
| Instance ID | 生成的镜像名 |
|-------------|-------------|
| `django__django-11333` | `docker.io/swebench/sweb.eval.x86_64.django_1776_django-11333:latest` |
| `astropy__astropy-12907` | `docker.io/swebench/sweb.eval.x86_64.astropy_1776_astropy-12907:latest` |

---

### 2. `extract_custom_tag()` - 提取自定义标签

```python
def extract_custom_tag(base_image: str) -> str:
    """
    从完整镜像名中提取实例标识符
    
    输入: "docker.io/swebench/sweb.eval.x86_64.django_1776_django-12155:latest"
    输出: "sweb.eval.x86_64.django_1776_django-12155"
    """
    name_tag = base_image.split("/")[-1]  # "sweb.eval.x86_64.django_1776_django-12155:latest"
    name = name_tag.split(":")[0]         # "sweb.eval.x86_64.django_1776_django-12155"
    return name
```

**作用**：从镜像名中提取唯一标识符，用于后续构建 Agent 镜像的标签。

---

### 3. `should_wrap_*()` - 判断是否需要包装

```python
def should_wrap_custom_tag(custom_tag: str) -> bool:
    # 检查自定义标签是否属于需要包装的仓库
    prefix = "sweb.eval.x86_64."
    if custom_tag.startswith(prefix):
        custom_tag = custom_tag[len(prefix):]  # 去掉前缀
    # 提取仓库名（第一个 "_" 之前）
    return custom_tag.split("_", 1)[0] in constants.WRAPPED_REPOS

def should_wrap_instance_id(instance_id: str) -> bool:
    # 直接从实例 ID 检查
    repo = instance_id.split("__")[0]  # "django__django-11333" -> "django"
    return repo in constants.WRAPPED_REPOS
```

**`constants.WRAPPED_REPOS`** 是需要额外依赖的仓库列表（通常只有 `sphinx-doc`）：

```python
# 在 constants.py 中
WRAPPED_REPOS = ["sphinx-doc"]  # 需要 docutils<0.21 和 roman
```

**为什么需要包装**：
- Sphinx-doc 需要 `docutils<0.21` 和 `roman` 包
- 其他仓库不需要这些依赖
- 包装层是一个轻量级的 Dockerfile，在原镜像基础上安装额外依赖

---

### 4. `collect_unique_base_images()` - 收集唯一的基础镜像

```python
def collect_unique_base_images(
    dataset,
    split,
    n_limit,
    selected_instances_file: str | None = None,
):
    # 1. 加载数据集
    df = get_dataset(
        dataset_name=dataset,      # "princeton-nlp/SWE-bench_Verified"
        split=split,               # "test"
        eval_limit=n_limit,        # 10 (如果指定)
        selected_instances_file=selected_instances_file,  # "test_instances.txt"
    )
    
    # 2. 遍历所有行，提取实例 ID，生成镜像名
    # 3. 使用 set 去重（因为多个实例可能共享同一个基础镜像）
    # 4. 返回排序后的唯一镜像列表
    return sorted(
        {get_official_docker_image(str(row["instance_id"])) for _, row in df.iterrows()}
    )
```

**输出示例**：
```python
[
    "docker.io/swebench/sweb.eval.x86_64.astropy_1776_astropy-12907:latest",
    "docker.io/swebench/sweb.eval.x86_64.django_1776_django-11333:latest",
    "docker.io/swebench/sweb.eval.x86_64.django_1776_django-12155:latest",
    ...
]
```

---

### 5. `wrap_image()` - 包装镜像

```python
def wrap_image(agent_image: str, push: bool = False) -> BuildOutput:
    """
    在 agent-server 镜像上添加 docutils/roman 依赖层
    
    agent_image: "ghcr.io/openhands/eval-agent-server:5967796-sweb.eval.x86_64.sphinx-doc_1776_sphinx-8595-source-minimal"
    """
    
    # 1. 如果需要推送，检查基础镜像是否存在于远程仓库
    if push and not image_exists(agent_image):
        return BuildOutput(error="镜像不存在于仓库")
    
    # 2. 检查包装 Dockerfile 是否存在
    if not WRAPPER_DOCKERFILE.exists():
        return BuildOutput(error="Dockerfile.swebench-deps 不存在")
    
    # 3. 构建包装层（使用相同的标签，原地替换）
    return run_docker_build_layer(
        dockerfile=WRAPPER_DOCKERFILE,
        context=WRAPPER_DOCKERFILE.parent,
        tags=[agent_image],  # 使用相同标签
        build_args={"SDK_IMAGE": agent_image},  # 基础镜像作为构建参数
        push=push,
        platform="linux/amd64",
        load=not push,
    )
```

**`Dockerfile.swebench-deps` 内容示例**：
```dockerfile
ARG SDK_IMAGE
FROM ${SDK_IMAGE}

# 安装 sphinx-doc 需要的特定依赖
RUN pip install --no-cache-dir 'docutils<0.21' roman

# 保持其他所有内容不变
```

**关键点**：
- ✅ **原地替换**：使用相同的镜像标签，新层覆盖旧镜像
- ✅ **轻量级**：只添加几个 pip 包，不重新构建整个环境
- ✅ **选择性**：只包装 `sphinx-doc` 等特定仓库

---

### 6. `_wrap_if_needed()` - 构建后回调

```python
def _wrap_if_needed(result: BuildOutput, push: bool) -> BuildOutput:
    """
    构建完成后的回调函数，自动检查是否需要包装
    
    这个函数会被传递给 build_all_images 的 post_build_fn 参数
    """
    if not result.tags:
        return result  # 构建失败，直接返回
    
    agent_image = result.tags[0]  # 获取构建的镜像标签
    
    # 从标签中提取自定义标签
    # "ghcr.io/.../eval-agent-server:5967796-sweb.eval.x86_64.django_1776_django-11333-source-minimal"
    #                                       ^^^^^^^  ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^  ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
    #                                       SDK SHA  custom_tag                                  target
    tag_part = agent_image.split(":")[-1]
    parts = tag_part.split("-", 1)
    custom_tag = parts[1].rsplit("-", 1)[0] if len(parts) > 1 else tag_part
    
    # 检查是否需要包装
    if not should_wrap_custom_tag(custom_tag):
        return result  # 不需要包装，直接返回
    
    logger.info("需要包装 %s，应用 docutils/roman 层", agent_image)
    
    # 执行包装
    wrap_result = wrap_image(agent_image, push)
    if wrap_result.error:
        return BuildOutput(
            base_image=result.base_image,
            tags=result.tags,
            error=f"包装失败: {wrap_result.error}",
        )
    
    return result
```

**工作流程**：
```
构建 Agent 镜像
    ↓
检查是否需要包装
    ↓
如果是 sphinx-doc → 添加 docutils/roman 层
如果是其他仓库 → 保持原样
    ↓
返回最终镜像
```

---

### 7. `main()` - 主函数

```python
def main(argv: list[str]) -> int:
    # 1. 解析命令行参数
    parser = get_build_parser()
    parser.set_defaults(**BUILD_DEFAULTS)
    args = parser.parse_args(argv)
    
    # 2. 收集需要构建的唯一基础镜像列表
    base_images: list[str] = collect_unique_base_images(
        args.dataset,           # "princeton-nlp/SWE-bench_Verified"
        args.split,             # "test"
        args.n_limit,           # 10
        args.select,            # "test_instances.txt"
    )
    # base_images = [
    #     "docker.io/swebench/sweb.eval.x86_64.django_1776_django-11333:latest",
    #     "docker.io/swebench/sweb.eval.x86_64.astropy_1776_astropy-12907:latest",
    #     ...
    # ]
    
    # 3. 设置构建输出目录
    build_dir = default_build_output_dir(args.dataset, args.split)
    # build_dir = "builds/princeton-nlp/SWE-bench_Verified/test/"
    
    # 4. 批量构建所有镜像
    return build_all_images(
        base_images=base_images,
        target=args.target,                          # "source-minimal"
        build_dir=build_dir,
        image=args.image,                            # "ghcr.io/openhands/eval-agent-server"
        push=args.push,                              # False (本地构建)
        max_workers=args.max_workers,                # 4
        dry_run=args.dry_run,                        # False
        max_retries=args.max_retries,                # 3
        base_image_to_custom_tag_fn=extract_custom_tag,  # 提取标签的函数
        post_build_fn=_wrap_if_needed,               # 构建后回调（包装检查）
    )
```

## 🏗️ 完整构建流程图

```
用户命令
  |
  ↓
main() 解析参数
  |
  ↓
collect_unique_base_images()
  ├─ 加载数据集 (HuggingFace)
  ├─ 读取实例 ID
  ├─ 生成官方镜像名
  └─ 去重排序
  |
  ↓
build_all_images() [在 build_utils.py 中]
  |
  ↓
对每个基础镜像 (并行):
  |
  ├─ 1. 检查基础镜像是否存在
  |     └─ 如果不存在 → 拉取/构建
  |
  ├─ 2. 构建 Agent 层
  |     ├─ 使用 SDK Dockerfile
  |     ├─ 添加 OpenHands Agent
  |     └─ 标签: {IMAGE}:{SDK_SHA}-{custom_tag}-{target}
  |
  ├─ 3. post_build_fn: _wrap_if_needed()
  |     ├─ 检查仓库是否在 WRAPPED_REPOS 中
  |     ├─ 如果是 → wrap_image()
  |     |   └─ 添加 docutils/roman 层
  |     └─ 如果否 → 跳过
  |
  └─ 4. 记录到 manifest.jsonl
  
  ↓
输出构建结果
  ├─ manifest.jsonl (所有镜像映射)
  ├─ 构建日志 (logs/)
  └─ 镜像标签列表
```

我在中国大陆，上述脚本有哪些操作是需要访问外网导致build失败的

# 🌐 中国大陆网络障碍分析

你的问题非常关键！在大陆运行 SWE-Bench 构建确实会遇到多个网络障碍。让我逐一分析：

---

## 🚫 需要访问外网的操作（按执行顺序）

### 1. **HuggingFace 数据集下载** ⚠️ 高风险

```python
# 在 collect_unique_base_images() 中
df = get_dataset(
    dataset_name="princeton-nlp/SWE-bench_Verified",  # ← 需要访问 HuggingFace
    split="test",
)
```

**访问的域名**：
- `huggingface.co`
- `cdn-lfs.huggingface.co`（大文件存储）

**失败表现**：
```bash
ConnectionError: Couldn't reach https://huggingface.co/datasets/princeton-nlp/SWE-bench_Verified
或
ReadTimeoutError: HTTPSConnectionPool(host='huggingface.co', port=443): Read timed out
```

**数据大小**：~2-3 MB（SWE-bench_Verified）

---

### 2. **Docker Hub 拉取基础镜像** ⚠️ 高风险

```python
# 在 build_all_images() 中
base_image = "docker.io/swebench/sweb.eval.x86_64.django_1776_django-11333:latest"
# Docker 会尝试从 Docker Hub 拉取
```

**访问的域名**：
- `registry-1.docker.io`（Docker Hub 镜像仓库）
- `production.cloudflare.docker.com`（CDN）
- `auth.docker.io`（认证服务）

**失败表现**：
```bash
Error response from daemon: Get "https://registry-1.docker.io/v2/": 
net/http: TLS handshake timeout
或
error pulling image configuration: download failed after attempts=6: 
dial tcp: lookup registry-1.docker.io: i/o timeout
```

**数据大小**：每个镜像 ~500MB - 2GB（共 7 个 = 3-14GB）

---

### 3. **Pip 安装 Python 包** ⚠️ 中等风险

在构建 Agent 层时：

```dockerfile
# SDK Dockerfile 中
RUN pip install --no-cache-dir \
    openhands-sdk \
    openhands-workspace \
    ...
```

**访问的域名**：
- `pypi.org`
- `files.pythonhosted.org`

**失败表现**：
```bash
WARNING: Retrying (Retry(total=4, connect=None, read=None, redirect=None, status=None)) 
after connection broken by 'ReadTimeoutError': HTTPSConnectionPool(host='files.pythonhosted.org', port=443)
```

**数据大小**：~100-500 MB

---

### 4. **包装层依赖安装** ⚠️ 低风险（仅 sphinx-doc）

```dockerfile
# Dockerfile.swebench-deps
RUN pip install --no-cache-dir 'docutils<0.21' roman
```

**访问的域名**：同上 `pypi.org`

**数据大小**：~5-10 MB

---

### 5. **GitHub Container Registry (GHCR)** ⚠️ 低风险（仅 push）

如果使用 `--push` 参数：

```python
# 推送到 GHCR
docker push ghcr.io/openhands/eval-agent-server:TAG
```

**访问的域名**：
- `ghcr.io`
- `github.com`

**大陆访问状态**：通常可访问，但可能较慢

## 🛠️ 解决方案（按推荐顺序）

### 方案 1：配置国内镜像源 ⭐ 推荐

#### 1.1 配置 HuggingFace 镜像

```bash
# 方法 1：环境变量（推荐）
export HF_ENDPOINT=https://hf-mirror.com

# 方法 2：写入配置文件
mkdir -p ~/.huggingface
cat > ~/.huggingface/config.json <<EOF
{
  "endpoint": "https://hf-mirror.com"
}
EOF

# 验证
uv run python -c "
from datasets import load_dataset
import os
print(f'HF Endpoint: {os.getenv(\"HF_ENDPOINT\", \"default\")}')
ds = load_dataset('princeton-nlp/SWE-bench_Verified', split='test[:10]')
print(f'✓ Successfully loaded {len(ds)} instances')
"
```

#### 1.2 配置 Docker Hub 镜像

```bash
# 创建 Docker daemon 配置
sudo mkdir -p /etc/docker
sudo tee /etc/docker/daemon.json <<EOF
{
  "registry-mirrors": [
    "https://docker.m.daocloud.io",
    "https://docker.nju.edu.cn",
    "https://mirror.ccs.tencentyun.com",
    "https://dockerproxy.com"
  ]
}
EOF

# 重启 Docker
sudo systemctl daemon-reload
sudo systemctl restart docker

# 验证配置
docker info | grep -A 5 "Registry Mirrors"

# 测试拉取
docker pull docker.io/swebench/sweb.eval.x86_64.django_1776_django-11333:latest
```

| 腾讯云 | `https://mirror.ccs.tencentyun.com` | ⭐⭐⭐⭐ |

### 方案 2：使用代理 ⭐⭐⭐

#### 2.1 配置系统代理

```bash
# 假设你有代理运行在 localhost:7890
export http_proxy=http://127.0.0.1:7890
export https_proxy=http://127.0.0.1:7890
export HTTP_PROXY=http://127.0.0.1:7890
export HTTPS_PROXY=http://127.0.0.1:7890

# 排除本地地址
export no_proxy=localhost,127.0.0.1,::1
export NO_PROXY=localhost,127.0.0.1,::1

# 测试代理
curl -I https://huggingface.co
curl -I https://registry-1.docker.io
```

#### 2.2 配置 Docker 使用代理

```bash
# 创建 Docker 代理配置
sudo mkdir -p /etc/systemd/system/docker.service.d
sudo tee /etc/systemd/system/docker.service.d/http-proxy.conf <<EOF
[Service]
Environment="HTTP_PROXY=http://127.0.0.1:7890"
Environment="HTTPS_PROXY=http://127.0.0.1:7890"
Environment="NO_PROXY=localhost,127.0.0.1,::1"
EOF

# 重启 Docker
sudo systemctl daemon-reload
sudo systemctl restart docker

# 验证
sudo systemctl show --property=Environment docker
```

#### 2.3 永久配置（写入 shell 配置文件）

```bash
# 添加到 ~/.bashrc 或 ~/.zshrc
cat >> ~/.bashrc <<'EOF'
# Proxy settings
export http_proxy=http://127.0.0.1:7890
export https_proxy=http://127.0.0.1:7890
export HTTP_PROXY=http://127.0.0.1:7890
export HTTPS_PROXY=http://127.0.0.1:7890
export no_proxy=localhost,127.0.0.1,::1
export NO_PROXY=localhost,127.0.0.1,::1

# HuggingFace mirror
export HF_ENDPOINT=https://hf-mirror.com

# Pip mirror
export PIP_INDEX_URL=https://pypi.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/simple
export PIP_TRUSTED_HOST=pypi.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn
EOF

source ~/.bashrc
```

### 方案 3：预下载资源 ⭐⭐

#### 3.1 预下载 HuggingFace 数据集

```bash
# 使用镜像站下载
export HF_ENDPOINT=https://hf-mirror.com

uv run python <<EOF
from datasets import load_dataset

#### 3.2 预拉取 Docker 基础镜像

```bash
# 从 manifest.jsonl 提取镜像列表
cat ~/workspace/benchmarks/builds/princeton-nlp/SWE-bench_Verified/test/manifest.jsonl | jq -r '.base_image' > images_to_pull.txt

# 或者从你的 test_instances.txt 生成

    repo=$(echo $instance_id | cut -d'_' -f1 | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]')
    name=$(echo $instance_id | cut -d'_' -f2- | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]')
    echo "docker.io/swebench/sweb.eval.x86_64.${repo}_1776_${name}:latest"

# 批量拉取（使用镜像源）

### 方案 4：修改 Dockerfile 使用国内源 ⭐⭐⭐⭐

如果你要修改 SDK 的 Dockerfile：

```bash
# 1. 进入 SDK submodule
cd vendor/software-agent-sdk

# 2. 备份原始 Dockerfile
cp openhands/runtime/Dockerfile openhands/runtime/Dockerfile.bak

# 3. 修改 Dockerfile，在所有 pip install 命令前添加镜像源
sed -i 's|pip install|pip install --index-url https://pypi.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/simple|g' openhands/runtime/Dockerfile

# 4. 或者手动编辑，添加 pip 配置
vim openhands/runtime/Dockerfile
```

在 Dockerfile 中添加：

```dockerfile
# 在所有 RUN 命令之前添加
RUN pip config set global.index-url https://pypi.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/simple && \
    pip config set global.trusted-host pypi.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn
```

### 方案 5：跳过失败的实例 ⭐

如果只是个别实例失败（如 sphinx-doc）：

```bash
# 1. 从 test_instances.txt 中移除失败的实例
grep -v "sphinx-doc" test_instances.txt > test_instances_filtered.txt

# 2. 使用过滤后的列表
uv run python -m benchmarks.swebench.build_images \
  --dataset princeton-nlp/SWE-bench_Verified \
  --split test \
  --select test_instances_filtered.txt \
  --image ghcr.io/openhands/eval-agent-server \
  --target source-minimal \
  --max-workers 4

# 3. 后续推理时也使用过滤后的列表
uv run swebench-infer .llm_config/test.json \
    --select test_instances_filtered.txt \
    --workspace docker
```

## 🔧 完整配置脚本（推荐使用）

保存为 `setup_china_mirrors.sh`：

```bash
#!/bin/bash
# setup_china_mirrors.sh - 配置中国大陆镜像源

set -e

echo "🌐 配置中国大陆镜像源..."

# 1. HuggingFace 镜像
echo ""
echo "1️⃣ 配置 HuggingFace 镜像..."
export HF_ENDPOINT=https://hf-mirror.com
mkdir -p ~/.huggingface
cat > ~/.huggingface/config.json <<EOF
{
  "endpoint": "https://hf-mirror.com"
}
EOF
echo "✓ HuggingFace 镜像已配置"

# 2. Docker 镜像
echo ""
echo "2️⃣ 配置 Docker Hub 镜像..."
sudo mkdir -p /etc/docker
sudo tee /etc/docker/daemon.json > /dev/null <<EOF
{
  "registry-mirrors": [
    "https://docker.m.daocloud.io",
    "https://docker.nju.edu.cn",
    "https://mirror.ccs.tencentyun.com"
  ],
  "max-concurrent-downloads": 10,
  "log-driver": "json-file",
  "log-level": "warn",
  "log-opts": {
    "max-size": "10m",
    "max-file": "3"
  }
}
EOF

sudo systemctl daemon-reload
sudo systemctl restart docker
echo "✓ Docker 镜像已配置并重启"

# 3. Pip 镜像
echo ""
echo "3️⃣ 配置 Pip 镜像..."
mkdir -p ~/.pip
cat > ~/.pip/pip.conf <<EOF
[global]
index-url = https://pypi.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/simple
trusted-host = pypi.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn
timeout = 120
retries = 5
EOF
echo "✓ Pip 镜像已配置"

# 4. 环境变量
echo ""
echo "4️⃣ 配置环境变量..."
if ! grep -q "HF_ENDPOINT" ~/.bashrc; then
    cat >> ~/.bashrc <<'EOF'

# China Mirrors Configuration
export HF_ENDPOINT=https://hf-mirror.com
export PIP_INDEX_URL=https://pypi.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/simple
export PIP_TRUSTED_HOST=pypi.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn
EOF
    echo "✓ 环境变量已添加到 ~/.bashrc"
else
    echo "⚠ 环境变量已存在于 ~/.bashrc"
fi

# 5. 验证配置
echo ""
echo "5️⃣ 验证配置..."

echo -n "  - HuggingFace: "
if curl -s --max-time 5 https://hf-mirror.com > /dev/null; then
    echo "✓"
else
    echo "✗ (无法访问)"
fi

echo -n "  - Docker: "
docker info | grep -q "Registry Mirrors" && echo "✓" || echo "✗"

echo -n "  - Pip: "
pip config get global.index-url | grep -q "tsinghua" && echo "✓" || echo "✗"

echo ""
echo "🎉 配置完成！请运行以下命令使环境变量生效："
echo "   source ~/.bashrc"
echo ""
echo "然后重新运行构建命令。"
```

运行脚本：

```bash
chmod +x setup_china_mirrors.sh
./setup_china_mirrors.sh

## 🎯 总结

### 必须解决的网络问题（优先级排序）：

1. **Docker Hub 镜像拉取** ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐（最重要，数据量最大）
2. **HuggingFace 数据集下载** ⭐⭐⭐⭐（必需，但只需下载一次）
3. **Pip 包安装** ⭐⭐⭐（中等重要，有镜像源）
4. **GHCR 推送** ⭐（仅远程评测需要）

### 时间估算（配置镜像后）：

| 操作 | 无镜像 | 有镜像 |
|------|--------|--------|
| 数据集下载 | 5-30 分钟或超时 | 30-60 秒 |
| Docker 镜像拉取 (7个) | 1-2 小时或失败 | 10-20 分钟 |
| Pip 包安装 | 10-30 分钟 | 2-5 分钟 |

**配置镜像源后，你的构建成功率应该从 ~85% 提升到 ~95%+** 🚀

# 📦 Docker 镜像拉取 - 精炼版

## 🎯 核心答案

**不是 1 个基础镜像，而是每个实例 1 个镜像！**

你选择了 **7 个实例** = 需要拉取 **7 个镜像**（约 9-12 GB）

---

## 💡 为什么需要多个镜像？

每个 SWE-Bench 实例有独立的环境：
- ✅ 不同的代码 commit
- ✅ 不同的 Python 版本  
- ✅ 不同的依赖版本

**示例：**
```
django__django-11333  → Python 3.6 + commit 419a783
django__django-12155  → Python 3.7 + commit 0668164  (不同镜像！)
```

---

## 📋 镜像命名规则

```bash
docker.io/swebench/sweb.eval.x86_64.{repo}_1776_{issue}:latest

# 示例
docker.io/swebench/sweb.eval.x86_64.django_1776_django-11333:latest
```

## 🚀 快速拉取脚本

### 方法 1：自动拉取（推荐）

```bash
#!/bin/bash
# pull_images.sh

while IFS= read -r instance_id; do
    [[ -z "$instance_id" || "$instance_id" == \#* ]] && continue
    instance_id=$(echo "$instance_id" | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]')
    repo=$(echo "$instance_id" | cut -d'_' -f1)
    issue=$(echo "$instance_id" | cut -d'_' -f2-)
    image="docker.io/swebench/sweb.eval.x86_64.${repo}_1776_${issue}:latest"
    
    echo "Pulling: $image"
    docker pull "$image" || echo "Failed: $image"
done < test_instances.txt
```

### 方法 2：并行拉取（更快）

```bash
# 同时拉取 4 个镜像
cat test_instances.txt | while read id; do
    id=$(echo "$id" | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]')
    repo=$(echo "$id" | cut -d'_' -f1)
    issue=$(echo "$id" | cut -d'_' -f2-)
    echo "docker.io/swebench/sweb.eval.x86_64.${repo}_1776_${issue}:latest"
done | xargs -P 4 -I {} docker pull {}
```

## ⚠️ 常见问题

**Q: 为什么 `docker images` 看不到？**  
A: 搜索关键词错误，应使用：
```bash
docker images | grep "sweb.eval"  # 不是 grep "eval-agent-server"
```

**Q: 可以共用基础镜像吗？**  
A: 不行。即使是同一仓库（如 django），不同 issue 的 commit 不同，必须独立镜像。

**Q: 拉取失败怎么办？**  
A: 配置 Docker 镜像源（见上方"配置镜像源"），或使用代理。

## 🎯 步骤 1：配置中国大陆镜像源（必需）

```bash
#!/bin/bash
# setup_mirrors.sh - 一键配置所有镜像源

echo "🌐 配置镜像源..."

# 1. HuggingFace 镜像
export HF_ENDPOINT=https://hf-mirror.com
mkdir -p ~/.huggingface
cat > ~/.huggingface/config.json <<EOF
{
  "endpoint": "https://hf-mirror.com"
}
EOF

# 2. Docker 镜像
sudo mkdir -p /etc/docker
sudo tee /etc/docker/daemon.json <<EOF
{
  "registry-mirrors": [
    "https://docker.m.daocloud.io",
    "https://docker.nju.edu.cn",
    "https://mirror.ccs.tencentyun.com"
  ],
  "max-concurrent-downloads": 10
}
EOF
sudo systemctl daemon-reload
sudo systemctl restart docker

# 3. Pip 镜像
mkdir -p ~/.pip
cat > ~/.pip/pip.conf <<EOF
[global]
index-url = https://pypi.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/simple
trusted-host = pypi.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn
timeout = 120
EOF

# 4. 环境变量
cat >> ~/.bashrc <<'EOF'

# China Mirrors
export HF_ENDPOINT=https://hf-mirror.com
export PIP_INDEX_URL=https://pypi.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/simple
EOF

source ~/.bashrc

echo "✅ 镜像源配置完成！"
```

./setup_mirrors.sh
